title: Better Badlands
description: Expanding upon the lackluster badlands biome, Mojang-style.
body: [![Abnormals Core](https://bit.ly/mcacorebadge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abnormals-core) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/440256241932173323?label=&color=824000&labelColor=C56100&logo=Discord&logoColor=824000&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/VzXSCFp) [![Twitter Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/teamauroramods?label=&color=824000&labelColor=C56100&logo=Twitter&logoColor=824000&style=for-the-badge)](https://twitter.com/teamauroramods) [![All Features](https://img.shields.io/badge/-features-824000?style=for-the-badge)](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vQT6i1UJZIivV86z3nIhlvCw3tIVSDmKAOYAY5WhTlZYwzSvwsH0_JBHtDhwsotDVUbzfXXOEVTAIFd/pub) ![divider](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/272420887121362945/780149797242929192/better_badlands.png) Expanding upon the lackluster badlands biome, Mojang-style. Better Badlands improves Minecraft’s badlands biome with a few new features like improved generation and new blocks. **Compatible with:** - [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) - stick bundles for kindling recipe, kindling vertical slab **Full feature list can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vQT6i1UJZIivV86z3nIhlvCw3tIVSDmKAOYAY5WhTlZYwzSvwsH0_JBHtDhwsotDVUbzfXXOEVTAIFd/pub)** ![divider](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/272420887121362945/780149797242929192/better_badlands.png) [](https://nodecraft.com/r/aurora)
